aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some foundational elements in place, such as schema markup and a service-oriented website structure. However, there are significant gaps in reviews, local SEO, and content depth.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to generate Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search presence.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, location-specific pages, and FAQs to target relevant keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with location-based keywords to improve search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and engagement.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not actively managed, with no reviews and minimal information. This significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No customer reviews, which are crucial for local SEO and trust building.
Incomplete business information, such as hours of operation and service areas.
Lack of regular posts or updates to engage with potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website but lacks citations on major local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major local directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media and industry-specific directories.
Monitor and respond to any existing citations to maintain accuracy and improve local SEO.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and engagement on Google Business Profile
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers looking for reviews and social proof
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement a review generation strategy and optimize GBP with relevant keywords and images
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Create high-quality, location-specific content and engage with local communities to build authority and improve search rankings

page_title: Heart Heating Cooling Plumbing & Electrical | Denver, CO
